generated_oml:
instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ThermalIncubatorPlant, RaspberryPiController
]

instance ThermalIncubatorPlant : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical components forming the plant for precise temperature regulation in biological sample stability"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B used as physical controller for thermal management and sensor data collection"
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor in thermal incubator system for biological sample stability"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IncubatorTemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, StateEstimatorAlgorithm, OptimizerAlgorithm
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of physical dimensions using CAD models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, StateEstimatorAlgorithm, OptimizerAlgorithm
]

instance ThermalDifferentialEquationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for dynamic thermal behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, StateEstimatorAlgorithm, OptimizerAlgorithm
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms that update model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictionService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms processing sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimatorAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithms for system state prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizerAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for thermal management control"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for optimization functions"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance RabbitMQMessageQueue : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for message queuing between components in Digital Twin framework"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission service using RabbitMQ message queuing"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataFlow
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors system safety and optimal performance using calibrated models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetected, PerformanceDeviationDetected
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates current operating conditions for prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides FutureStatePrediction
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes thermal management for biological sample stability"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTemperatureSetting
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory controllers for feedback-controlled thermal management"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureAdjustmentAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in thermal incubator system using fault detectors"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates system state using state estimators"
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentStateEstimate
]

instance SafetyViolationDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violation in thermal incubator system"
]

instance PerformanceDeviationDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected deviation from optimal performance in thermal incubator system"
]

instance FutureStatePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted future state of thermal incubator based on current conditions"
]

instance OptimalTemperatureSetting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal temperature setting for biological sample stability"
]

instance TemperatureAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of temperature to maintain optimal conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected fault in thermal incubator system components"
]

instance CurrentStateEstimate : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of thermal incubator system"
]

instance DataFlow : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission between physical and digital components"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Changes to the Physical Twin are initiated by human operators or algorithmic decisions following detection of system violations by monitors, based on the Digital Twin's analysis of sensor data and model updates."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured via calibration algorithms that adjust parameters to minimize residual error against sensor data, with continuous monitoring against safety and optimality thresholds. Detected violations trigger corrective actions to the Physical Twin."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring mechanisms within the Digital Twin evaluate the Physical Twin's safety and operational performance; safety violations trigger corrective actions by human operators or automated algorithms to modify the Physical Twin's state."
]
